description: Seeds sixteen provenance-documented 6000x4000 wallpapers without replacing existing user files.
Launches one-time user-session setup after login.
Seeds hardware-specific Niri display config when absent.
Seeds the Noctalia v5 Niri template include when absent.
Seeds Starship only when the user has no config.
Seeds a valid fallback Ghostty theme until Noctalia v5 regenerates it.
Stows curated, hardware-agnostic Noctalia v5 user config.
Marks Noctalia first-run setup complete so the shell keeps the managed theme and wallpaper instead of its bundled first-run defaults.
Pins the Noctalia settings sidecar schema version and default wallpaper so sidecar migrations cannot drop the managed wallpaper.
Renders Noctalia terminal colors into Ghostty's managed theme.
Renders the active Noctalia primary color for icon theme accent selection.
Reloads an active Ghostty service through systemd after Noctalia renders its theme.
Maps the active Noctalia accent to the closest installed Yaru icon theme.
